# PR Review Checklist

## Problem/Intent
- PROBLEM_INTENT: TODO(describe the user/problem intent this PR solves)

## Scope Boundaries
- SCOPE_BOUNDARIES: TODO(define in-scope and explicitly list out-of-scope)

## Evidence/Tests
- EVIDENCE_TESTS: TODO(link evidence artifacts and include test command/results)

## Risks/Rollback
- RISKS_ROLLBACK: TODO(list key risks and exact rollback steps)

## Reviewer Decision
- REVIEWER_DECISION: TODO(choose one: APPROVE | REQUEST_CHANGES | BLOCK)
